name: Barbarian
summary: Wild and ferocious warrior who taps into primal fury for explosive combat strength.

class_features.name: Fast Movement
class_features.summary: +10 ft land speed in light/medium armor (and no encumbrance).

class_features.name: Rage
class_features.summary: 4 + Con modifier rounds of rage per day. While raging: +4 morale Str/Con, +2 morale Will saves, -2 AC; cannot use Cha/Dex/Int skills (except Acrobatics, Fly, Intimidate, Ride) or any ability requiring patience.
